job.basePrompt: Weekly tech newsletter. Categories: AI, Hardware, Policy, Security. Group each item under one of those exact labels. English.

items.title: Anthropic ships new reasoning model
items.content: Anthropic released a new model update focused on multi-step reasoning tasks. Benchmark scores show improvements on math and code, with modest cost increases.

items.title: OpenAI adjusts free tier rate limits
items.content: OpenAI quietly adjusted rate limits on its free tier to reduce abuse after a surge in scraping activity. Paid customers are unaffected by the change.

items.title: Critical zero-day patched in widely used web server
items.content: A zero-day vulnerability in a popular web server software was patched this week after active exploitation in the wild. Admins are urged to update immediately.

items.title: New phishing campaign targets crypto wallets
items.content: Researchers detailed a phishing campaign using lookalike domains to target self-custody crypto wallets. Losses are estimated in the low millions so far.
